arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham transfer value rockets after Birmingham City benefit from clause
arts.sum: With an estimated value of €251.4million, the all action midfielder leads former Borussia Dortmund team-mate Erling Haaland, who is second, and Real Madrid colleague Vinícius Júnior, who are said to be worth €221.5m and €205.7m respectively. He spent one year in the Blues first team before moving on to Borussia Dortmund and then to Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga club pushing to beat Birmingham City in race for 25-year-old midfielder
arts.sum: Birmingham City target Lennard Maloney has been the subject of a concrete offer from Mainz 05, according to… The post Bundesliga club pushing to beat Birmingham City in race for 25-year-old midfielder appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Every transfer deal completed in League One as Birmingham City chase January first signing
arts.sum: The league’s top scorer, Louie Barry, was recalled from his loan at Stockport County by Aston Villa and Wycombe have lost influential defender Caleb Taylor to parent club West Bromwich Albion. Outs: Brandon Khela (loan to Bradford City)

arts.ttl: Supporters on trial as Birmingham City prepare for alcohol experiment at St Andrew's
arts.sum: As such, the Blues will participate in a pilot scheme later this month that also includes Bristol City at Ashton Gate, Newcastle at Kingston Park and Southampton at St Mary’s for supporters of the clubs' women's teams to consume alcohol in view of the pitch. Birmingham City supporters will get the chance to drink alcohol in the stands at St Andrew's later this month as part of a trial involving four women's teams.
